description_long: This object is a decorative pennant mounted on a wooden post with a crossbar, featuring a pointed black metal finial at the top and spiked black metal end caps on the crossbar. The wood is textured with visible grain, and the crossbar is secured with two red leather straps and metal rivets. A triangular, orange-red fabric pennant with a yellow border hangs from the crossbar, attached by the leather straps. The fabric drapes naturally, suggesting a lightweight, flexible material. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the combination of wood, metal, leather, and fabric giving it a medieval or fantasy aesthetic. This type of pennant would likely be used for marking boundaries, entrances, or as a decorative element in urban parks or themed environments.
description: A wooden post with a crossbar, topped with black metal spikes and adorned with a red-orange triangular pennant hanging from leather straps. The pennant features a yellow border and is attached securely to the crossbar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full triangular pennant, leather straps, and all decorative metal elements clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the post and the way the pennant fabric drapes backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crossbar, the reverse side of the pennant, and the wood grain detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pennant's side profile and the attachment of the leather straps.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant is a solid orange-red triangle with a yellow border and no visible text or symbols. The design is simple and bold, emphasizing color contrast.
